Provides keyboard input handling.

`Viper.Input.Keyboard` exposes a registry-backed runtime surface without requiring callers to
construct the class directly. Its public surface exposes operations including `IsDown`,
`IsUp`, `AnyDown`, `GetDown`.

<a id="viper-input-manager"></a>
### `Viper.Input.Manager`

Provides high-level input manager.

Create `Viper.Input.Manager` values through its registered constructor and use the returned
object with the instance members below. Its public surface exposes properties such as
`DebounceDelay`, `MouseX`, `MouseY` and operations including `Update`, `KeyPressed`,
`KeyReleased`, `KeyHeld`.

Constructor: `Viper.Input.Manager.New`
